title: Director Script Schema
description: Format for the AI-generated director script used by the Recitation Trainer

slides.description: One entry per PPT slide, in order

title.description: Slide title as it appears on the slide

beats.description: Beat-by-beat oral script. Each beat = one spoken line + one gesture.

beat.description: Sequential beat number within this slide

ppt_guide.description: What to point at on screen (Chinese). E.g., 手指向标题, 手扫过三栏

english.description: The spoken English line for this beat. Keep sentences short and conversational.

action.description: Optional gesture/timing note (Chinese). E.g., 微笑, 停一拍, 看观众

full_text.description: All english lines concatenated into one flowing paragraph. This is the TTS input. Keep it natural — short sentences, conversational tone.
